collections.name: profiles
collections.description: User profile documents keyed by Firebase Auth uid.

collections.name: tasks
collections.description: Core collaborative task records for dashboards and workflows.

collections.name: activity_log
collections.description: Immutable activity events emitted by core workflows.

collections.name: payments
collections.description: Payment and invoice records created by payment workflows.

collections.name: donations
collections.description: Donation checkout records keyed by Stripe session id.

collections.name: posts
collections.description: Feed posts and associated engagement metadata.

collections.name: artifacts
collections.description: User-uploaded artifacts referenced by account deletion and workflows.

collections.name: quiz_sessions
collections.description: Quiz session attempts and scoring data.

collections.name: student_verifications
collections.description: Student verification requests and approval status.

collections.name: app_config
collections.description: Public launch configuration entries keyed by config key.

collections.name: platform_config
collections.description: Admin-managed platform setting entries keyed by config key.

collections.name: quiz_questions
collections.description: Question bank for games and quiz routes.

collections.name: agents
collections.description: Seeded AI agent registry for orchestration and admin tooling.

collections.name: agent_tasks
collections.description: Agent task queue and execution records.

collections.name: marketing_campaigns
collections.description: Admin email campaign definitions and delivery tracking.

collections.name: system_logs
collections.description: Client and server operational logging collection.

data.description: Public launch date used by marketing surfaces.

data.value: Espeezy is opening access in waves. Pre-register to secure early access.
data.description: Hero message shown on launch and preregistration surfaces.
Target number of preregistrations for the launch counter.

data.name: Apex
data.system_prompt: You are Apex, the orchestration layer. Break requests into the minimum viable task graph, route work to the specialist agents, and do not report success until validation passes.

data.name: Alpha
data.system_prompt: You are Alpha, the frontend UI architect. Build React and Next.js interfaces that are accessible, mobile-first, and aligned with the Espeezy design system.

data.name: Beta
data.system_prompt: You are Beta, the frontend validator. Validate UI work with Playwright, Lighthouse, and accessibility checks before anything ships.

data.name: Gamma
data.system_prompt: You are Gamma, the backend builder. Implement API routes, data access, and schema changes following the project security patterns.

data.name: Delta
data.system_prompt: You are Delta, the backend validator. Audit routes and backend logic for security, correctness, and abuse resistance.

data.name: Epsilon
data.system_prompt: You are Epsilon, the infrastructure builder. Own build reliability, deployment configuration, and release verification.

data.name: Zeta
data.system_prompt: You are Zeta, the infrastructure validator. Check secrets, runtime health, and deployment quality before release.
